identity.name: RealtouchHR
identity.vibe: Compliance Confidence. Structured, Calm, Assured, Enterprise-Grade but Human.
principles: Fusion: Swiss Precision (Grids) + Organic Warmth (Paper textures, soft shadows)
Emotion: Confidence. Every interaction should feel stable and verified.
Content: Data is the hero. Compliance status is the narrative.
Zoom In: Focus on the 'Next Best Action'. Don't overwhelm.
Negative Space: Luxury is space. Don't cram the dashboard.

usage.caption: text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground tracking-wide uppercase
usage.code: font-mono text-xs bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-primary

rules: Use 'Emerald' ONLY for Compliance Success/High Score.
Primary Indigo is for Actions (Buttons, Links, Active States).
Backgrounds should never be pure white (#FFFFFF) in light mode, use a very subtle cool tint.

containers.card: rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
containers.panel: rounded-2xl border border-border bg-card shadow-sm p-6

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 hover:shadow-indigo-500/40 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-6 font-medium border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background/50 px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.compliance_score: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-white dark:from-emerald-950/30 dark:to-background border border-emerald-100 dark:border-emerald-900/50 p-8
cards.next_action: rounded-2xl bg-indigo-600 text-white p-8 shadow-xl shadow-indigo-900/20 relative overflow-hidden

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm

hero_bg.usage: Landing Page Hero Background, Login Screen Background

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.
DO NOT use gradients for text. It looks cheap.
DO NOT use 'Tile Farm' layouts (grids of equal cards). Use 'Bento' grids with varied spans.
Compliance Score must be visible on the Dashboard at all times.
Next Best Action must be the most prominent element on the Dashboard.
Use 'Glassmorphism' for sticky headers and overlays.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA/WCAG AA).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs. 'p-8' is the new 'p-4'.
